items.title: Zcash bounces 45% as developers propose new 'Ironwood' upgrade
items.summary: The plan would let anyone verify that no counterfeit coins are circulating, addressing the patched bug that triggered last week's crash. ZEC is still down about 22% on the week.

items.title: ETH falls to 13-month low on Zcash bug, Bitcoin below $60K: Is $1.4K next?
items.summary: ETH price crashed below $1,600 as a vulnerability in Zcash emerged and Bitcoin sold off below $60,000 for the first time in months.

items.title: Bitcoin rebound highlights discount but $162M bid liquidity points to downside risk
items.summary: Bitcoin's recovery highlights investors' belief that BTC is discounted, but weak futures market activity could slow the rebound.

items.title: Aave chief defends protocol's 'resilience' after $8.45 billion bank run
items.summary: The founder of the largest DeFi platform blamed "third-party” entities for decentralized finance’s vulnerabilities, while independent data highlights severe gaps in Aave’s own risk architecture.

items.title: Gold slips below 200-day moving average offering glimmer of hope for bitcoin bulls
items.summary: Gold falls into bear market territory, while a stronger U.S. dollar and rising rate expectations pressure risk assets.

items.title: 'Best thesis' for Bitcoin accumulation surfaces despite current downside risk: Analyst
items.summary: Record-low Bitcoin RSI readings and whale accumulation highlight a generational buying opportunity, even as analysts still expect BTC to fall below $60,000.

items.title: What happens to Bitcoin if Nasdaq falls further?
items.summary: Bitcoin eyes a rally toward $92,630 as BTC defends key long-term support while the Nasdaq flashes deeper correction risks.

items.title: Bitcoin risks new purge with bear-market losses still $35B below 2022 total
items.summary: Bitcoin realized losses remained below the $211 billion tally from 2022, leading to a prediction that the next bear-market bottom was not yet in.

items.title: Coinbase and Cardless unveil credit card backed by stablecoins
items.summary: The stablecoin-secured card is for situations where a credit card cannot be approved on an unsecured basis.

items.title: Saylor blamed AI for bitcoin crash. Arca has one word for that: Nonsense
items.summary: Arca is blaming Strategy's sale of 32 BTC for last week's BTC crash, not AI capital rotation, as Strategy's Saylor claimed.

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin above $63,000 as some traders peg SpaceX's IPO as 'next catalyst'
items.summary: Stocks recovered through SpaceX's oversubscribed IPO, an Nvidia and SK Hynix chip pact, and Apple's AI reboot, while crypto trailed.

items.title: Chinese mining CEO says Strategy can survive a $30,000 bitcoin without selling
items.summary: Jiang Zhuoer of BTC.TOP called the week's selloff speculation overblown, arguing Strategy's small debt and the design of its preferred shares let it keep buying.

items.title: Humanity Protocol token crashes more than 80% after a $32 million private-key hack
items.summary: The decentralized identity project said attackers compromised the keys of a foundation member and are dumping the stolen H tokens for ether.

items.title: Over 200 crypto firms push Senate to pass CLARITY Act
items.summary: Crypto lobby groups representing hundreds of organizations urged Senate leaders in a letter to schedule a vote on a key crypto bill ahead of the midterms.

items.title: AI agents with crypto could escape and become ‘unstoppable,’ experts warn
items.summary: Autonomous AI and crypto could have “far-reaching consequences for users and the financial system,” IC3 researchers said.

items.title: UK financial regulator floats allowing 10% crypto allocations for retail funds
items.summary: The Financial Conduct Authority floated the idea of allowing limited exposure to crypto for retail-focused funds if it aligns with “disclosed investment objectives.”

items.title: Humanity Protocol token falls 85% amid $30M private key exploit
items.summary: The compromise of private keys belonging to a member of the Humanity Foundation has reportedly resulted in the theft of at least $30 million worth of its native token.

items.title: OpenAI confidentially files to go public in the US
items.summary: OpenAI says it filed for an initial public offering in the US, but has not yet decided when it will launch.

items.title: Forehead tattoos and alcohol dares: Inside the dark underbelly of crypto's memecoin craze
items.summary: Users are being paid to shave their heads, chug liquor and interview homeless people on camera, raising questions about whether Pump.fun's latest product rewards creativity or exploitation.

items.title: Influential research firm that caused AI stock meltdown lays out Hyperliquid as 'compelling' idea
items.summary: Unlike most crypto, Hyperliquid actually generates cash flow and has a token buyback mechanism, says Citrini Research
